stories.title: World Matchplay Darts: Updates, video, analysis, scores, commentary with Gerwyn Price, James Wade, Gian van Veen in action
stories.summary: The 2026 Betfred World Matchplay darts tournament resumes Wednesday night with Cameron Menzies facing Ross Smith in a high-stakes second-round match. Menzies stunned Luke Humphries Monday with a dramatic 170 checkout, while Smith dominated Kevin Doets 10-6 averaging 100.55 and hitting seven 180s. The winner advances to the quarterfinals set for July 18-22.

stories.title: L'Allemagne autorise un projet nucléaire russo-français controversé
stories.summary: L'Allemagne a autorisé mercredi 22 juillet la production de combustible nucléaire à Lingen, en Basse-Saxe, par ANF, filiale de Framatome, en coopération avec le russe Rosatom. Malgré les tensions liées à la guerre en Ukraine, Berlin ne peut bloquer le projet faute de sanctions européennes interdisant cette collaboration. Les autorités assurent que les risques sont maîtrisés, mais l'arrivée d'experts et d'équipements russes alimente les craintes sécuritaires. La production vise à alimenter des centrales nucléaires européennes de conception russe encore en service.

stories.title: The best games of 2026 so far, picked by NPR's staff
stories.summary: Grand Theft Auto VI is set to launch November 19, overshadowing the first half of 2026’s game releases. Despite industry layoffs and studio closures, standout titles like Resident Evil Requiem and Pokémon Pokopia drew strong audiences. Early-access sequels Subnautica 2 and Slay the Spire 2 also gained popularity. The second half of the year promises more major releases, including VR titles like The Lightkeepers.

stories.title: Silver futures rise to Rs 2.26 lakh per kg
stories.summary: Silver futures surged to Rs 2.26 lakh per kg on July 21, 2026, a 1.11% rise from the previous day. The increase followed fresh positions in futures trade on the Multi Commodity Exchange, with September delivery closing at Rs 2,26,257 per kg. Overseas, Comex silver futures climbed 1.34% to USD 59.58 per ounce. Analysts attribute the rise to firm global trends and increased market participation.

stories.title: ‘Terrifying’: Woman says landlord was hiding behind wall of Wexford holiday home
stories.summary: A mother and her family were left terrified after discovering a landlord hiding inside a Wexford holiday home they had booked exclusively. Therese, who stayed overnight with her partner and two children via Booking.com, said the landlord assured her he wouldn’t be present when they returned. Upon coming back, she found him concealed behind a wall. Booking.com has suspended the property and launched an investigation.

stories.title: La serata con gli amici, la lite con la moglie e la strada contromano: i tragici minuti prima dello schianto a Budoni
stories.summary: A 34-year-old Ukrainian man died after driving the wrong way on the SS131 near Budoni early July 22 and crashing into a concrete barrier. Police say he argued with his wife over who would drive their Volkswagen Passat, then sped off in the wrong direction. His 9-year-old son, in the back seat, survived with minor injuries. Investigators are reviewing dashcam and witness evidence.

stories.title: Ryanair Spain flight suffers 'technical issue' and met by emergency services
stories.summary: A Ryanair flight from Malaga to Edinburgh issued a 7700 emergency code Wednesday before landing safely at Edinburgh Airport just after 8am. Emergency services met the plane on the tarmac as standard procedure following the minor technical issue. Passengers disembarked normally and engineers inspected the aircraft. Ryanair confirmed the incident and said the flight operated as scheduled after checks.

stories.title: Shenzhen-Invest-Aktie stabilisiert durch Hongkong-Immobilien
stories.summary: Shenzhen Investment Ltd.’s stock (0060) steadied as recurring rental and infrastructure fee cash flows from its Hongkong real estate holdings offset short-term project volatility. The group’s Greater Bay Area model links development, assets and infrastructure, but remains tightly tied to market cycles, refinancing costs and regulatory shifts. Shenzhen Investment, ISIN HK0152000357, focuses on a mixed portfolio of properties and infrastructure assets.

stories.title: Man, 30s, dies after being struck by van in Co Kilkenny
stories.summary: A man in his 30s died after being struck by a van on the R693 near Arigan Bridge, Cooleshal, Freshford, Co Kilkenny at 9.30am on Wednesday, 22 July 2026. The pedestrian was pronounced dead at the scene, and his body was taken to University Hospital Waterford for a post-mortem. The road was temporarily closed but has since reopened. Gardaí are appealing for witnesses or dash-cam footage from drivers travelling between Freshford and Kilkenny between 9am and 9.30am.

stories.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
stories.summary: Tesla reported weaker-than-expected earnings for the second quarter, with earnings per share at 33 cents adjusted, missing the 51 cents expected. Revenue topped estimates at $28.24 billion, but free cash flow turned negative and margins slid. The stock slid about 4% in extended trading on Wednesday. Tesla's core automotive segment generated $20.52 billion in revenue, up 23% from a year ago.

stories.title: Sony releases one last trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day
stories.summary: Sony has released the third trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day, featuring Tom Holland as Peter Parker. The trailer highlights Peter's backstory, including his farewell with MJ and his battle with the Hand. The film is set to release, with no specific date mentioned. As Peter faces a new threat that can take on anyone's form, he must also confront his own identity and the consequences of his actions.

stories.title: Preliminary independent autopsy results for Nolan Wells leave key questions unanswered
stories.summary: An 18-year-old’s death remains unsolved after an independent autopsy found no clear cause for Nolan Wells’ drowning off Mississippi’s Horn Island on July 6. The preliminary report, released weeks later, labeled his manner of death as undetermined, pending further review. The teen’s family requested the private autopsy after his body was found face-down near the shoreline. Toxicology results from the state’s official autopsy are still pending.

stories.title: Présidentielle 2027 : Jean-Luc Mélenchon tend une nouvelle fois la main aux Ecologistes en leur proposant un accord « global »
stories.summary: Jean-Luc Mélenchon renewed his call for a united left-wing alliance ahead of the 2027 presidential election, proposing a comprehensive agreement with Les Ecologistes covering the presidential race, legislative elections, and 2028 regional votes. The offer, made on July 22, is based on the 2022 Nupes program and targets the party directly. Mélenchon emphasized the "Nouvelle Alliance populaire" as the framework for cooperation. Negotiations are expected to intensify in coming months.

stories.title: Casemiro: Inter Miami being investigated for tampering after signing ex-Manchester United midfielder
stories.summary: Major League Soccer is investigating Inter Miami for alleged tampering after the club signed Brazilian midfielder Casemiro from Manchester United. The investigation concerns discovery rights, a regulation that gives a specific club first refusal over a player. Casemiro signed a one-year contract with an option to extend until 2028-29. The league will review the matter and release terms of a settlement between Inter Miami and LA Galaxy once the investigation is complete.

stories.title: Shownieuws creëert verwarring over lot Greetje in Urk!: 'Doet echt niet meer mee'
stories.summary: Greetje Hakvoort blijft meedoen in de realityserie Urk!, ondanks eerdere geruchten over haar vertrek. Presentatrice Fien Vermeulen suggereerde tijdens een uitzending van Shownieuws dat Hakvoort niet langer deelneemt, terwijl Teun Kapitein kort daarvoor nog bevestigde dat ze actief is in de serie. SBS6 en Hakvoort zelf ontkenden eerder dat ze zou stoppen. De verwarring ontstond na haar verhuizing naar Emmeloord.

stories.title: FC Bayern verlängert langfristig mit Jung-Profi Erblin Osmani
stories.summary: FC Bayern München has extended the contract of 17-year-old midfielder Erblin Osmani, who debuted in the Bundesliga at 16. The long-term deal includes an automatic conversion to a professional contract on his 18th birthday in May 2027. Initially assigned to the U19 squad, he may also feature for the Regionalliga team under Dante. The club highlights his local roots and early senior-team experience as key factors in the agreement.

stories.title: Messi-less Miami beat Fire 3-2 to spoil Lewandowski's MLS debut
stories.summary: Miami FC beat Chicago Fire 3-2, spoiling Robert Lewandowski's MLS debut. The Polish striker played 63 minutes for Chicago after signing from Barcelona. A 20-year-old Miami player, Plambeck, scored the winning goal in the 87th minute. Miami's victory comes four days after Argentina's World Cup loss, with several key players including Messi and Suarez missing.

stories.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
stories.summary: Google's parent company Alphabet reported negative free cash flow of $5.9 billion for the first time in at least a decade, due to spiraling spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure. The company's AI costs are expected to reach $205 billion this year, up from $190 billion. This surge in spending comes as Alphabet's combined quarterly revenue hit $119.8 billion, a 23% increase from last year. The company's stock fell 4% in after-hours trading.

stories.title: Inter Miami vs Chicago Fire live online: score, stats, goals & updates | MLS 2026
stories.summary: Inter Miami CF defeated Chicago Fire FC 3-2 in a Major League Soccer match. The final score was sealed with 8 minutes of added time. The win marks Inter Miami's third victory this season. The team will look to build on this momentum as they face their next opponent.

stories.title: Alphabet earnings takeaways: Q2 revenue beats, GOOGL stock sinks on 2026 capex hike
stories.summary: Google's Q2 revenue beats expectations, but its stock falls as the company raises its 2026 capital expenditure forecast to up to $205 billion. This significant increase in spending is expected to weigh on Alphabet's profit margins. The hike comes as Google dedicates resources to its Gemini 4 AI model and scales its Waymo autonomous taxi business. The company plans to release new AI models almost every month as Gemini scales.

stories.title: Pistrino, i bambini incontrano la Polizia di Stato
stories.summary: On July 21, police in Città di Castello met with kindergarteners at Pistrino’s Sacro Cuore summer program to explain their daily work. About 20 children toured a patrol car, learned safety rules and asked questions during the interactive session. The initiative aims to build trust between youth and law enforcement through hands-on learning. Future school visits are planned to expand the outreach.

stories.title: HSV-Neuzugang Patson Daka: Ein Schicksalsschlag veränderte sein Leben
stories.summary: Patson Daka, a 27-year-old Sambian striker, has signed a contract with Hamburg SV. Daka has faced significant challenges in his life, including the loss of his father at age 14 and the early retirement of his best friend Enock Mwepu due to a heart condition. Daka's career has taken him from Sambia to Austria, England, and now Germany, with notable transfers including a 30 million euro move to Leicester City. He will now play for HSV, following a significant change in his life.

stories.title: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
stories.summary: US launches 12th consecutive night of strikes on Iran, following a Houthi claim of an attack on two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea. The Houthis targeted the Encelia and Layla tankers with drones and missiles, allegedly for violating their naval blockade. Two people were killed in the US strikes on Iran, according to Iranian state media. The US has threatened to escalate its response if Iran continues to target ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Preview: Inter Miami vs. Chicago Fire - prediction, team news, lineups
stories.summary: Inter Miami hosts Chicago Fire at Nu Stadium on Wednesday in a crucial Eastern Conference matchup. The Herons, second in the conference, seek to bounce back from a 4-3 defeat against Orlando City, while the Fire, third in the conference, aim to extend their three-match winning run. The match is the biggest of the midweek round, with both teams looking to assert their dominance. A win for Inter Miami would keep them in contention for the top spot.

stories.title: Leon Goretzka ist dabei, seinen Ruf zu verspielen
stories.summary: German footballer Leon Goretzka is facing criticism after reportedly demanding a 10 million euro signing bonus from a new team. The 31-year-old's reputation has taken a hit following his behavior at the World Cup, including missing a penalty kick in a shootout against Paraguay. Goretzka was once seen as a role model for speaking out on social issues, but his recent actions have tarnished his image. His future in the sport remains uncertain.

stories.title: Hosepipe ban in force for millions of households - is your area affected?
stories.summary: A hosepipe ban has taken effect for over 20 million households in southern and eastern England and parts of Wales, restricting use for watering gardens, washing vehicles and filling pools. The ban was implemented due to successive heatwaves straining water supplies. This is the largest such measure in the UK, raising concerns about water resource management and climate change. Residents are advised to conserve water amid a prolonged dry spell.

stories.title: Roma, e adesso? La nuova strategia di D’Amico: Nusa piace ma la pista è complicata. Ecco tutti i nomi
stories.summary: Roma's director of sport Tony D'Amico is actively pursuing a top-level trequartista to strengthen the team, with Antonio Nusa of Lipsia being a prime target. D'Amico is reportedly willing to make a significant investment to secure Nusa's transfer, despite the German club having no pressing need to sell. The Roma club is celebrating its 99th anniversary today, and a decision on Nusa's potential transfer could be made soon.

stories.title: Orrore al circo, M5s alla giunta Cirio: “Un anno fa promettevate interventi: non avete fatto nulla”
stories.summary: The Italian region of Piemonte is under fire for failing to follow through on promises to ban animal circuses, with a recent undercover investigation revealing widespread animal abuse and neglect. The investigation, which spanned four months, found evidence of physical violence, cramped living conditions, and potential labor law violations. The region has received over 600,000 euros in public funding for the circus industry in recent years. Authorities are now reviewing the findings, which are expected to reignite a national debate on the issue.

stories.title: Tories ask HMRC to investigate whether Nigel Farage owes tax on £5m gift
stories.summary: Conservatives have asked HMRC to investigate a £5m gift to Nigel Farage from crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne, questioning whether it constitutes taxable income. The gift was given with no expectation of return, according to Farage and Harborne's lawyers. HMRC will now review the matter. The outcome of this investigation could have significant implications for Farage's financial situation.

stories.title: Caitlin Clark, Sophie Cunningham's Final Box Score Stats, Highlights as Fever Beat Sun
stories.summary: The Indiana Fever beat the Connecticut Sun 123-108, setting a new franchise record for offense. Caitlin Clark led the team with 23 points, shooting 8-of-13 from the field and 5-of-9 from three. The win improves the Fever's record to 17-10, moving them into fifth place in the WNBA standings. The Fever will now take a few days off before several players head to Chicago for the All-Star Game.

stories.title: iPhone 18 Pro And iPhone 18 Pro Max Release Date: Apple’s Event Timeline Signals Exact Day
stories.summary: Apple will unveil the iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max on September 9, following its annual September keynote tradition. The launch will coincide with iOS 27’s public release, as Apple has held its iPhone event in early September every year since 2012. Preorders are expected to open the Friday before, with devices shipping the following week. Analysts anticipate the new models to feature upgraded cameras and faster processors.

stories.title: Nam nie trzeba sprzedawać Lewandowskiego jako baby z brodą
stories.summary: A 39-year-old Luis Suárez scored twice as Miami beat Chicago 3-2 in MLS on May 18, leading with a veteran’s flair. Robert Lewandowski’s future in the league remains tied to the struggling team, despite its tactical lapses. The match highlighted the MLS’s free-flowing style, marked by frequent errors and loose marking. Next, Miami aims to tighten its defense after conceding two avoidable goals.

stories.title: Has Trump dragged the US into a forever war in Iran? | Mohamad Bazzi
stories.summary: A US-Iran ceasefire collapses, marking nearly five months since the start of a US war against Iran launched by President Trump. The conflict has raised concerns that Trump may have dragged the US into a forever war, contradicting his 2020 campaign promise to end such conflicts. The US has been involved in wars in Afghanistan and Iraq for decades. The collapse of the ceasefire now raises the stakes for a potential escalation.

stories.title: World Cup 2026: Gavi does not think Paredes should be suspended
stories.summary: Spain midfielder Gavi believes Argentina's Leandro Paredes should not be suspended for his role in a confrontation following the World Cup final. Paredes appeared to push Spain's Eric Garcia by the throat, while Gavi was forced to the ground by Argentina's Thiago Almada. A disciplinary and ethics prosecutor has been appointed to assess the incident, which could result in suspensions and fines. The Argentine Football Association may also face a fine.

stories.title: Ohne Maut durch Tirol: Auf diesen Autobahnen brauchen Sie in Österreich keine Vignette
stories.summary: Austria has exempted a 12-kilometer stretch of the A12 Inntal Autobahn in Tirol from tolls, allowing drivers to bypass the usual vignette requirement. This section, near the German border, is a key route for travelers heading to Austrian ski resorts or further into Italy. The toll-free section spans from Kufstein to the German border. Drivers can now use this route without incurring the usual daily toll of 9.60 euros.

stories.title: Opinion | Amnesty International UK vs. J.K. Rowling
stories.summary: Amnesty International UK released a report on July 8, 2026, accusing "gender critical" advocates of being an "anti-rights" movement. The report targets figures including J.K. Rowling, framing their views as a threat to human rights. Amnesty’s stance has drawn criticism for allegedly straying from its traditional mission. The debate highlights ongoing tensions between free speech and gender identity advocacy in the UK.

stories.title: Nieudany debiut Lewandowskiego w MLS. Błyszczał ktoś inny
stories.summary: Robert Lewandowski made his Major League Soccer debut for Inter Miami against Chicago Fire on May 18, starting in the 1:40 a.m. ET match. The game ended 2-2, with Luis Suárez scoring twice and Lewandowski struggling to impact play. Miami’s Germán Berterame set up Suárez’s second goal with a heel assist. Miami now faces LA Galaxy next on May 25.

stories.title: Pitta faz balanço positivo de empate com Sporting Cristal e destaca decisão em Bragança Paulista
stories.summary: Bragantino and Sporting Cristal played to a scoreless draw in the Copa Sudamericana playoff first leg on May 22 in Bragança Paulista. Coach Pitta called it a positive result, noting both teams created chances but failed to capitalize. The sides meet again on May 29 at 21:30 local time, with the winner advancing to face Atlético-MG in the Round of 16. A tie would be decided by penalties.

stories.title: Chapecoense x Flamengo: onde assistir ao vivo, horário e escalações
stories.summary: Chapecoense faces Flamengo in a crucial Brasileirão match Wednesday at 9:30 p.m. Brasília time at Arena Condá. The game, part of the 19th round, airs live on Globo, Sportv and Premiere. Chapecoense sits last with nine points in 18 games after a 2-0 loss to Bahia, while Flamengo aims to cut Palmeiras’ seven-point lead after four pre-season wins.

stories.title: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
stories.summary: A Lego Donkey Kong arcade machine has been created, priced at $200, featuring a basic fully functional game with a working joystick and button to control Mario's movement and jumping. The game allows Mario to jump endless barrels, utilizing the same original barrels first released in 1989 for Lego's pirate sets. Shigeru Miyamoto, creator of Mario, is reportedly pleased with the design. The machine's release marks the latest in Lego's line of nostalgic gaming sets.

stories.title: China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, Trump tech adviser says
stories.summary: A US government adviser claims China's Moonshot AI stole capabilities from top US AI model Fable by distillation, gaining access to restricted Nvidia servers to train its K3 model. The alleged theft occurred through a weaker AI model extracting answers from a stronger one. This incident is linked to the recent unveiling of Moonshot's K3 model, which some believe has narrowed the gap between Western and Chinese AI models. The US government is now investigating the claims.

stories.title: Houthis Claim Strikes on 2 Saudi Oil Tankers in Red Sea
stories.summary: The Saudi authorities confirmed a strike on one of the ships. These are the first claimed attacks since the Iranian-backed Yemeni group announced a blockade on Saudi Arabia.

stories.title: Even camels can't cope: Africa's ships of the desert hit by rising temperatures
stories.summary: Rising temperatures in Africa's Afar region have taken a toll on camel populations, with herders reporting blistered feet, watery eyes, and skin burns in the scorching desert. At least eight camel calves have died in the past month due to extreme heat. The region is one of the hottest and driest places on Earth, where nomads lead camel caravans carrying salt. Herders are struggling to cope with the intensifying heat, which is affecting their livelihoods.

stories.title: Where to Find a Commonwealth Games 2026 Livestream in the U.S. to Watch the Event for Free
stories.summary: The 2026 Commonwealth Games will take place in Glasgow, Scotland from July 23 to August 2, featuring over 7,000 athletes from more than 70 nations. Viewers in the US can watch the event for free on CBC, Canada's national public broadcaster, by using a virtual private network like ExpressVPN or NordVPN. This allows users to set their location to Canada and stream the coverage online. The event marks the 96th edition of the quadrennial games, dating back to 1930.

stories.title: U.S.-Saudi Nuclear Deal Stokes Israeli Concerns of Mideast Arms Race
stories.summary: An Israeli minister sought to downplay the agreement, while critics said it could spur other regional countries to pursue a nuclear program, and potentially the creation of a bomb.

stories.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
stories.summary: The US and Saudi Arabia have signed a landmark nuclear deal, a "peaceful nuclear co-operation agreement," allowing Saudi Arabia to develop a civilian nuclear program. The deal includes a bilateral safeguards agreement and could provide great access for American companies in the Saudi nuclear energy program. The agreement marks a first for the US, potentially enabling Saudi Arabia to enrich uranium in the future. The partnership is expected to be a multi-billion-dollar, decades-long deal.

stories.title: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
stories.summary: US President Donald Trump has targeted Canada's dairy industry, singling out its supply management system as one of three main trade irritants. A 50% tariff on $20 billion worth of Canadian goods is set to take effect in August. Canadian politicians, including Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette, have indicated that dairy supply management is non-negotiable. The issue is now a major point of contention in US-Canada trade talks.

stories.title: Amish Shah Wins Democratic Primary in Swing Arizona House District
stories.summary: Dr. Amish Shah, who beat the choice of the party’s House campaign arm, will face Jay Feely, a Republican, in a battleground district that covers parts of Phoenix.

stories.title: Republican Lawmaker Urges Charges Against Jack Smith
stories.summary: The criminal referral could provide a catalyst for a prosecution of Mr. Smith, who as special counsel became a top target of the president’s retribution campaign.

stories.title: Most sewage spills in England may be illegal, new research suggests
stories.summary: New research suggests that up to 86% of raw sewage spills in England may be illegal, with most occurring during normal weather conditions, not heavy rain. The analysis, covering over 350 storm overflow outlets, found that water companies serving more than 30 million people are potentially violating regulations. This raises concerns about the environmental impact of these spills. The findings come as water companies face scrutiny over their handling of sewage discharges.

stories.title: Hope for thousands of MS patients as 'life-changing' drug now on NHS in England
stories.summary: A life-changing drug for thousands of multiple sclerosis patients is now available on the NHS in England, with up to 5,000 people set to benefit each year. The medication, fampridine, boosts nerve signals to help people walk and live independently. Clinical trials showed around four in 10 patients experienced improvements in walking speed and duration. This development could significantly enhance the quality of life for those affected, enabling them to move around their homes and engage with loved ones.

stories.title: Three Airports Plan to Ditch T.S.A. Agents Amid Push for Private Security
stories.summary: The airports have opted in to the agency’s new security model, an agency spokesperson confirmed on Wednesday. A union official said the move could jeopardize public safety.

stories.title: McInnes glad of Rangers backing in appeal against ban
stories.summary: Rangers manager Derek McInnes has received a four-match touchline ban for criticizing a late penalty awarded to Celtic at Motherwell in May. The comments were made when McInnes was in charge of Hearts, and Rangers are now contesting the ban, citing that the remarks were directed at the decision, not officials. McInnes has expressed his disagreement with the ban and is glad that Rangers will be appealing it. The outcome of the appeal will determine McInnes' availability for upcoming matches.

stories.title: House Passes Defense Bill Amid Iran War Divide
stories.summary: Republicans pushed through the $1.15 trillion bill over opposition from Democrats, who said backing it was akin to embracing the war.

stories.title: Tears and sleepless nights as Marshall and Adlington get Scotland flag honour
stories.summary: Scottish athletes Marshall and Adlington have been chosen to carry the Scotland flag at the Commonwealth Games. Marshall, a 59-year-old bowler, and Adlington, a 39-year-old judo athlete, will share the honor. The flag will be presented to them on the big show, but they've had to keep the news secret for weeks. The two athletes will now prepare for the Games, where Adlington aims to complete a treble.

stories.title: Shaken, Soaked and Seasick: What It’s Like to Survive ‘The Odyssey’ in 4DX
stories.summary: A 3-hour screening of Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" in 4DX format left some viewers shaken and soaked. The immersive experience, featuring seat-rumbling and water-spritzing technology, was available at select theaters. Over 100 people attended the event, with some reporting seasickness and others praising the unique experience. Theaters will continue to offer 4DX screenings of the film.

stories.title: Clarity Act Mired In Debate Over Whether to Bar President From Selling Crypto
stories.summary: Democrats and Republicans are haggling about the Clarity Act, a major bill pushed by the crypto industry, as it moves closer to a Senate vote.

stories.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
stories.summary: Liverpool is confident of signing 23-year-old Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola, who impressed with four goal contributions at the World Cup with France this summer. The Reds aim to beat Arsenal and Bayern Munich to the signature. Talks are ongoing, with a potential deal expected to be finalized soon. This move could strengthen Liverpool's attack ahead of the new season.

stories.title: Yeon Sang-ho Returns to ‘Parasyte’ Universe With ‘Tamiya,’ Starring Shioli Kutsuna, at Netflix
stories.summary: South Korean filmmaker Yeon Sang-ho is returning to the "Parasyte" universe with a new live-action series, "Parasyte: Tamiya," starring Shioli Kutsuna, set to stream on Netflix in 2027. The series marks a collaboration between Netflix and Yeon, who also co-wrote the script with Ryu Yong-jae.

stories.title: Target ultra-processed food to reduce obesity in Britain | Letter
stories.summary: A British health select committee report finds obesity is an engineered outcome, not a failure of willpower, with evidence pointing to sugar and refined carbohydrates as primary drivers of weight gain and type 2 diabetes. The report criticizes the "high in fat, salt or sugar" framework, which it says is flawed and has led to the low-fat, calorie-controlled orthodoxy. This approach has encouraged manufacturers to replace fat with sweet-tasting substitutes, often in the name of health. The committee is now calling for supermarkets and manufacturers to be held accountable.

stories.title: What Were the Lotus-Eaters Eating in Homer’s ‘Odyssey’?
stories.summary: In Homer’s epic, Odysseus’s men eat something so powerful that they forget about home. Which plants could have produced such a soporific, narcotic and amnesiac effect?

offbeat.title: World Matchplay Darts: Updates, video, analysis, scores, commentary with Gerwyn Price, James Wade, Gian van Veen in action
offbeat.summary: The 2026 Betfred World Matchplay darts tournament resumes Wednesday night with Cameron Menzies facing Ross Smith in a high-stakes second-round match. Menzies stunned Luke Humphries Monday with a dramatic 170 checkout, while Smith dominated Kevin Doets 10-6 averaging 100.55 and hitting seven 180s. The winner advances to the quarterfinals set for July 18-22.

offbeat.title: L'Allemagne autorise un projet nucléaire russo-français controversé
offbeat.summary: L'Allemagne a autorisé mercredi 22 juillet la production de combustible nucléaire à Lingen, en Basse-Saxe, par ANF, filiale de Framatome, en coopération avec le russe Rosatom. Malgré les tensions liées à la guerre en Ukraine, Berlin ne peut bloquer le projet faute de sanctions européennes interdisant cette collaboration. Les autorités assurent que les risques sont maîtrisés, mais l'arrivée d'experts et d'équipements russes alimente les craintes sécuritaires. La production vise à alimenter des centrales nucléaires européennes de conception russe encore en service.

offbeat.title: The best games of 2026 so far, picked by NPR's staff
offbeat.summary: Grand Theft Auto VI is set to launch November 19, overshadowing the first half of 2026’s game releases. Despite industry layoffs and studio closures, standout titles like Resident Evil Requiem and Pokémon Pokopia drew strong audiences. Early-access sequels Subnautica 2 and Slay the Spire 2 also gained popularity. The second half of the year promises more major releases, including VR titles like The Lightkeepers.

offbeat.title: Silver futures rise to Rs 2.26 lakh per kg
offbeat.summary: Silver futures surged to Rs 2.26 lakh per kg on July 21, 2026, a 1.11% rise from the previous day. The increase followed fresh positions in futures trade on the Multi Commodity Exchange, with September delivery closing at Rs 2,26,257 per kg. Overseas, Comex silver futures climbed 1.34% to USD 59.58 per ounce. Analysts attribute the rise to firm global trends and increased market participation.

offbeat.title: ‘Terrifying’: Woman says landlord was hiding behind wall of Wexford holiday home
offbeat.summary: A mother and her family were left terrified after discovering a landlord hiding inside a Wexford holiday home they had booked exclusively. Therese, who stayed overnight with her partner and two children via Booking.com, said the landlord assured her he wouldn’t be present when they returned. Upon coming back, she found him concealed behind a wall. Booking.com has suspended the property and launched an investigation.

offbeat.title: La serata con gli amici, la lite con la moglie e la strada contromano: i tragici minuti prima dello schianto a Budoni
offbeat.summary: A 34-year-old Ukrainian man died after driving the wrong way on the SS131 near Budoni early July 22 and crashing into a concrete barrier. Police say he argued with his wife over who would drive their Volkswagen Passat, then sped off in the wrong direction. His 9-year-old son, in the back seat, survived with minor injuries. Investigators are reviewing dashcam and witness evidence.

offbeat.title: Ryanair Spain flight suffers 'technical issue' and met by emergency services
offbeat.summary: A Ryanair flight from Malaga to Edinburgh issued a 7700 emergency code Wednesday before landing safely at Edinburgh Airport just after 8am. Emergency services met the plane on the tarmac as standard procedure following the minor technical issue. Passengers disembarked normally and engineers inspected the aircraft. Ryanair confirmed the incident and said the flight operated as scheduled after checks.

offbeat.title: Shenzhen-Invest-Aktie stabilisiert durch Hongkong-Immobilien
offbeat.summary: Shenzhen Investment Ltd.’s stock (0060) steadied as recurring rental and infrastructure fee cash flows from its Hongkong real estate holdings offset short-term project volatility. The group’s Greater Bay Area model links development, assets and infrastructure, but remains tightly tied to market cycles, refinancing costs and regulatory shifts. Shenzhen Investment, ISIN HK0152000357, focuses on a mixed portfolio of properties and infrastructure assets.

offbeat.title: Man, 30s, dies after being struck by van in Co Kilkenny
offbeat.summary: A man in his 30s died after being struck by a van on the R693 near Arigan Bridge, Cooleshal, Freshford, Co Kilkenny at 9.30am on Wednesday, 22 July 2026. The pedestrian was pronounced dead at the scene, and his body was taken to University Hospital Waterford for a post-mortem. The road was temporarily closed but has since reopened. Gardaí are appealing for witnesses or dash-cam footage from drivers travelling between Freshford and Kilkenny between 9am and 9.30am.

offbeat.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
offbeat.summary: Tesla reported weaker-than-expected earnings for the second quarter, with earnings per share at 33 cents adjusted, missing the 51 cents expected. Revenue topped estimates at $28.24 billion, but free cash flow turned negative and margins slid. The stock slid about 4% in extended trading on Wednesday. Tesla's core automotive segment generated $20.52 billion in revenue, up 23% from a year ago.

offbeat.title: Sony releases one last trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day
offbeat.summary: Sony has released the third trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day, featuring Tom Holland as Peter Parker. The trailer highlights Peter's backstory, including his farewell with MJ and his battle with the Hand. The film is set to release, with no specific date mentioned. As Peter faces a new threat that can take on anyone's form, he must also confront his own identity and the consequences of his actions.

offbeat.title: Preliminary independent autopsy results for Nolan Wells leave key questions unanswered
offbeat.summary: An 18-year-old’s death remains unsolved after an independent autopsy found no clear cause for Nolan Wells’ drowning off Mississippi’s Horn Island on July 6. The preliminary report, released weeks later, labeled his manner of death as undetermined, pending further review. The teen’s family requested the private autopsy after his body was found face-down near the shoreline. Toxicology results from the state’s official autopsy are still pending.

offbeat.title: Présidentielle 2027 : Jean-Luc Mélenchon tend une nouvelle fois la main aux Ecologistes en leur proposant un accord « global »
offbeat.summary: Jean-Luc Mélenchon renewed his call for a united left-wing alliance ahead of the 2027 presidential election, proposing a comprehensive agreement with Les Ecologistes covering the presidential race, legislative elections, and 2028 regional votes. The offer, made on July 22, is based on the 2022 Nupes program and targets the party directly. Mélenchon emphasized the "Nouvelle Alliance populaire" as the framework for cooperation. Negotiations are expected to intensify in coming months.

offbeat.title: Casemiro: Inter Miami being investigated for tampering after signing ex-Manchester United midfielder
offbeat.summary: Major League Soccer is investigating Inter Miami for alleged tampering after the club signed Brazilian midfielder Casemiro from Manchester United. The investigation concerns discovery rights, a regulation that gives a specific club first refusal over a player. Casemiro signed a one-year contract with an option to extend until 2028-29. The league will review the matter and release terms of a settlement between Inter Miami and LA Galaxy once the investigation is complete.

offbeat.title: Shownieuws creëert verwarring over lot Greetje in Urk!: 'Doet echt niet meer mee'
offbeat.summary: Greetje Hakvoort blijft meedoen in de realityserie Urk!, ondanks eerdere geruchten over haar vertrek. Presentatrice Fien Vermeulen suggereerde tijdens een uitzending van Shownieuws dat Hakvoort niet langer deelneemt, terwijl Teun Kapitein kort daarvoor nog bevestigde dat ze actief is in de serie. SBS6 en Hakvoort zelf ontkenden eerder dat ze zou stoppen. De verwarring ontstond na haar verhuizing naar Emmeloord.

offbeat.title: FC Bayern verlängert langfristig mit Jung-Profi Erblin Osmani
offbeat.summary: FC Bayern München has extended the contract of 17-year-old midfielder Erblin Osmani, who debuted in the Bundesliga at 16. The long-term deal includes an automatic conversion to a professional contract on his 18th birthday in May 2027. Initially assigned to the U19 squad, he may also feature for the Regionalliga team under Dante. The club highlights his local roots and early senior-team experience as key factors in the agreement.

offbeat.title: Messi-less Miami beat Fire 3-2 to spoil Lewandowski's MLS debut
offbeat.summary: Miami FC beat Chicago Fire 3-2, spoiling Robert Lewandowski's MLS debut. The Polish striker played 63 minutes for Chicago after signing from Barcelona. A 20-year-old Miami player, Plambeck, scored the winning goal in the 87th minute. Miami's victory comes four days after Argentina's World Cup loss, with several key players including Messi and Suarez missing.

offbeat.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
offbeat.summary: Google's parent company Alphabet reported negative free cash flow of $5.9 billion for the first time in at least a decade, due to spiraling spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure. The company's AI costs are expected to reach $205 billion this year, up from $190 billion. This surge in spending comes as Alphabet's combined quarterly revenue hit $119.8 billion, a 23% increase from last year. The company's stock fell 4% in after-hours trading.

offbeat.title: Inter Miami vs Chicago Fire live online: score, stats, goals & updates | MLS 2026
offbeat.summary: Inter Miami CF defeated Chicago Fire FC 3-2 in a Major League Soccer match. The final score was sealed with 8 minutes of added time. The win marks Inter Miami's third victory this season. The team will look to build on this momentum as they face their next opponent.

offbeat.title: Alphabet earnings takeaways: Q2 revenue beats, GOOGL stock sinks on 2026 capex hike
offbeat.summary: Google's Q2 revenue beats expectations, but its stock falls as the company raises its 2026 capital expenditure forecast to up to $205 billion. This significant increase in spending is expected to weigh on Alphabet's profit margins. The hike comes as Google dedicates resources to its Gemini 4 AI model and scales its Waymo autonomous taxi business. The company plans to release new AI models almost every month as Gemini scales.

offbeat.title: Pistrino, i bambini incontrano la Polizia di Stato
offbeat.summary: On July 21, police in Città di Castello met with kindergarteners at Pistrino’s Sacro Cuore summer program to explain their daily work. About 20 children toured a patrol car, learned safety rules and asked questions during the interactive session. The initiative aims to build trust between youth and law enforcement through hands-on learning. Future school visits are planned to expand the outreach.

offbeat.title: HSV-Neuzugang Patson Daka: Ein Schicksalsschlag veränderte sein Leben
offbeat.summary: Patson Daka, a 27-year-old Sambian striker, has signed a contract with Hamburg SV. Daka has faced significant challenges in his life, including the loss of his father at age 14 and the early retirement of his best friend Enock Mwepu due to a heart condition. Daka's career has taken him from Sambia to Austria, England, and now Germany, with notable transfers including a 30 million euro move to Leicester City. He will now play for HSV, following a significant change in his life.

offbeat.title: Preview: Inter Miami vs. Chicago Fire - prediction, team news, lineups
offbeat.summary: Inter Miami hosts Chicago Fire at Nu Stadium on Wednesday in a crucial Eastern Conference matchup. The Herons, second in the conference, seek to bounce back from a 4-3 defeat against Orlando City, while the Fire, third in the conference, aim to extend their three-match winning run. The match is the biggest of the midweek round, with both teams looking to assert their dominance. A win for Inter Miami would keep them in contention for the top spot.

offbeat.title: Leon Goretzka ist dabei, seinen Ruf zu verspielen
offbeat.summary: German footballer Leon Goretzka is facing criticism after reportedly demanding a 10 million euro signing bonus from a new team. The 31-year-old's reputation has taken a hit following his behavior at the World Cup, including missing a penalty kick in a shootout against Paraguay. Goretzka was once seen as a role model for speaking out on social issues, but his recent actions have tarnished his image. His future in the sport remains uncertain.

offbeat.title: Roma, e adesso? La nuova strategia di D’Amico: Nusa piace ma la pista è complicata. Ecco tutti i nomi
offbeat.summary: Roma's director of sport Tony D'Amico is actively pursuing a top-level trequartista to strengthen the team, with Antonio Nusa of Lipsia being a prime target. D'Amico is reportedly willing to make a significant investment to secure Nusa's transfer, despite the German club having no pressing need to sell. The Roma club is celebrating its 99th anniversary today, and a decision on Nusa's potential transfer could be made soon.

offbeat.title: Orrore al circo, M5s alla giunta Cirio: “Un anno fa promettevate interventi: non avete fatto nulla”
offbeat.summary: The Italian region of Piemonte is under fire for failing to follow through on promises to ban animal circuses, with a recent undercover investigation revealing widespread animal abuse and neglect. The investigation, which spanned four months, found evidence of physical violence, cramped living conditions, and potential labor law violations. The region has received over 600,000 euros in public funding for the circus industry in recent years. Authorities are now reviewing the findings, which are expected to reignite a national debate on the issue.

offbeat.title: Tories ask HMRC to investigate whether Nigel Farage owes tax on £5m gift
offbeat.summary: Conservatives have asked HMRC to investigate a £5m gift to Nigel Farage from crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne, questioning whether it constitutes taxable income. The gift was given with no expectation of return, according to Farage and Harborne's lawyers. HMRC will now review the matter. The outcome of this investigation could have significant implications for Farage's financial situation.

offbeat.title: Caitlin Clark, Sophie Cunningham's Final Box Score Stats, Highlights as Fever Beat Sun
offbeat.summary: The Indiana Fever beat the Connecticut Sun 123-108, setting a new franchise record for offense. Caitlin Clark led the team with 23 points, shooting 8-of-13 from the field and 5-of-9 from three. The win improves the Fever's record to 17-10, moving them into fifth place in the WNBA standings. The Fever will now take a few days off before several players head to Chicago for the All-Star Game.

offbeat.title: iPhone 18 Pro And iPhone 18 Pro Max Release Date: Apple’s Event Timeline Signals Exact Day
offbeat.summary: Apple will unveil the iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max on September 9, following its annual September keynote tradition. The launch will coincide with iOS 27’s public release, as Apple has held its iPhone event in early September every year since 2012. Preorders are expected to open the Friday before, with devices shipping the following week. Analysts anticipate the new models to feature upgraded cameras and faster processors.

offbeat.title: Nam nie trzeba sprzedawać Lewandowskiego jako baby z brodą
offbeat.summary: A 39-year-old Luis Suárez scored twice as Miami beat Chicago 3-2 in MLS on May 18, leading with a veteran’s flair. Robert Lewandowski’s future in the league remains tied to the struggling team, despite its tactical lapses. The match highlighted the MLS’s free-flowing style, marked by frequent errors and loose marking. Next, Miami aims to tighten its defense after conceding two avoidable goals.

offbeat.title: Has Trump dragged the US into a forever war in Iran? | Mohamad Bazzi
offbeat.summary: A US-Iran ceasefire collapses, marking nearly five months since the start of a US war against Iran launched by President Trump. The conflict has raised concerns that Trump may have dragged the US into a forever war, contradicting his 2020 campaign promise to end such conflicts. The US has been involved in wars in Afghanistan and Iraq for decades. The collapse of the ceasefire now raises the stakes for a potential escalation.

offbeat.title: World Cup 2026: Gavi does not think Paredes should be suspended
offbeat.summary: Spain midfielder Gavi believes Argentina's Leandro Paredes should not be suspended for his role in a confrontation following the World Cup final. Paredes appeared to push Spain's Eric Garcia by the throat, while Gavi was forced to the ground by Argentina's Thiago Almada. A disciplinary and ethics prosecutor has been appointed to assess the incident, which could result in suspensions and fines. The Argentine Football Association may also face a fine.

offbeat.title: Ohne Maut durch Tirol: Auf diesen Autobahnen brauchen Sie in Österreich keine Vignette
offbeat.summary: Austria has exempted a 12-kilometer stretch of the A12 Inntal Autobahn in Tirol from tolls, allowing drivers to bypass the usual vignette requirement. This section, near the German border, is a key route for travelers heading to Austrian ski resorts or further into Italy. The toll-free section spans from Kufstein to the German border. Drivers can now use this route without incurring the usual daily toll of 9.60 euros.

offbeat.title: Opinion | Amnesty International UK vs. J.K. Rowling
offbeat.summary: Amnesty International UK released a report on July 8, 2026, accusing "gender critical" advocates of being an "anti-rights" movement. The report targets figures including J.K. Rowling, framing their views as a threat to human rights. Amnesty’s stance has drawn criticism for allegedly straying from its traditional mission. The debate highlights ongoing tensions between free speech and gender identity advocacy in the UK.

offbeat.title: Nieudany debiut Lewandowskiego w MLS. Błyszczał ktoś inny
offbeat.summary: Robert Lewandowski made his Major League Soccer debut for Inter Miami against Chicago Fire on May 18, starting in the 1:40 a.m. ET match. The game ended 2-2, with Luis Suárez scoring twice and Lewandowski struggling to impact play. Miami’s Germán Berterame set up Suárez’s second goal with a heel assist. Miami now faces LA Galaxy next on May 25.

offbeat.title: Pitta faz balanço positivo de empate com Sporting Cristal e destaca decisão em Bragança Paulista
offbeat.summary: Bragantino and Sporting Cristal played to a scoreless draw in the Copa Sudamericana playoff first leg on May 22 in Bragança Paulista. Coach Pitta called it a positive result, noting both teams created chances but failed to capitalize. The sides meet again on May 29 at 21:30 local time, with the winner advancing to face Atlético-MG in the Round of 16. A tie would be decided by penalties.

offbeat.title: Chapecoense x Flamengo: onde assistir ao vivo, horário e escalações
offbeat.summary: Chapecoense faces Flamengo in a crucial Brasileirão match Wednesday at 9:30 p.m. Brasília time at Arena Condá. The game, part of the 19th round, airs live on Globo, Sportv and Premiere. Chapecoense sits last with nine points in 18 games after a 2-0 loss to Bahia, while Flamengo aims to cut Palmeiras’ seven-point lead after four pre-season wins.

offbeat.title: Even camels can't cope: Africa's ships of the desert hit by rising temperatures
offbeat.summary: Rising temperatures in Africa's Afar region have taken a toll on camel populations, with herders reporting blistered feet, watery eyes, and skin burns in the scorching desert. At least eight camel calves have died in the past month due to extreme heat. The region is one of the hottest and driest places on Earth, where nomads lead camel caravans carrying salt. Herders are struggling to cope with the intensifying heat, which is affecting their livelihoods.

offbeat.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
offbeat.summary: The US and Saudi Arabia have signed a landmark nuclear deal, a "peaceful nuclear co-operation agreement," allowing Saudi Arabia to develop a civilian nuclear program. The deal includes a bilateral safeguards agreement and could provide great access for American companies in the Saudi nuclear energy program. The agreement marks a first for the US, potentially enabling Saudi Arabia to enrich uranium in the future. The partnership is expected to be a multi-billion-dollar, decades-long deal.

offbeat.title: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
offbeat.summary: US President Donald Trump has targeted Canada's dairy industry, singling out its supply management system as one of three main trade irritants. A 50% tariff on $20 billion worth of Canadian goods is set to take effect in August. Canadian politicians, including Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette, have indicated that dairy supply management is non-negotiable. The issue is now a major point of contention in US-Canada trade talks.

breaking.title: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
breaking.summary: US launches 12th consecutive night of strikes on Iran, following a Houthi claim of an attack on two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea. The Houthis targeted the Encelia and Layla tankers with drones and missiles, allegedly for violating their naval blockade. Two people were killed in the US strikes on Iran, according to Iranian state media. The US has threatened to escalate its response if Iran continues to target ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

breaking.title: Houthis Claim Strikes on 2 Saudi Oil Tankers in Red Sea
breaking.summary: The Saudi authorities confirmed a strike on one of the ships. These are the first claimed attacks since the Iranian-backed Yemeni group announced a blockade on Saudi Arabia.

breaking.title: U.S.-Saudi Nuclear Deal Stokes Israeli Concerns of Mideast Arms Race
breaking.summary: An Israeli minister sought to downplay the agreement, while critics said it could spur other regional countries to pursue a nuclear program, and potentially the creation of a bomb.

facts.title: Hosepipe ban in force for millions of households - is your area affected?
facts.summary: A hosepipe ban has taken effect for over 20 million households in southern and eastern England and parts of Wales, restricting use for watering gardens, washing vehicles and filling pools. The ban was implemented due to successive heatwaves straining water supplies. This is the largest such measure in the UK, raising concerns about water resource management and climate change. Residents are advised to conserve water amid a prolonged dry spell.

facts.title: Most sewage spills in England may be illegal, new research suggests
facts.summary: New research suggests that up to 86% of raw sewage spills in England may be illegal, with most occurring during normal weather conditions, not heavy rain. The analysis, covering over 350 storm overflow outlets, found that water companies serving more than 30 million people are potentially violating regulations. This raises concerns about the environmental impact of these spills. The findings come as water companies face scrutiny over their handling of sewage discharges.

facts.title: What Were the Lotus-Eaters Eating in Homer’s ‘Odyssey’?
facts.summary: In Homer’s epic, Odysseus’s men eat something so powerful that they forget about home. Which plants could have produced such a soporific, narcotic and amnesiac effect?

tech.title: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
tech.summary: A Lego Donkey Kong arcade machine has been created, priced at $200, featuring a basic fully functional game with a working joystick and button to control Mario's movement and jumping. The game allows Mario to jump endless barrels, utilizing the same original barrels first released in 1989 for Lego's pirate sets. Shigeru Miyamoto, creator of Mario, is reportedly pleased with the design. The machine's release marks the latest in Lego's line of nostalgic gaming sets.

crisis.title: China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, Trump tech adviser says
crisis.summary: A US government adviser claims China's Moonshot AI stole capabilities from top US AI model Fable by distillation, gaining access to restricted Nvidia servers to train its K3 model. The alleged theft occurred through a weaker AI model extracting answers from a stronger one. This incident is linked to the recent unveiling of Moonshot's K3 model, which some believe has narrowed the gap between Western and Chinese AI models. The US government is now investigating the claims.

crisis.title: Three Airports Plan to Ditch T.S.A. Agents Amid Push for Private Security
crisis.summary: The airports have opted in to the agency’s new security model, an agency spokesperson confirmed on Wednesday. A union official said the move could jeopardize public safety.

crisis.title: Clarity Act Mired In Debate Over Whether to Bar President From Selling Crypto
crisis.summary: Democrats and Republicans are haggling about the Clarity Act, a major bill pushed by the crypto industry, as it moves closer to a Senate vote.

entertainment.title: Where to Find a Commonwealth Games 2026 Livestream in the U.S. to Watch the Event for Free
entertainment.summary: The 2026 Commonwealth Games will take place in Glasgow, Scotland from July 23 to August 2, featuring over 7,000 athletes from more than 70 nations. Viewers in the US can watch the event for free on CBC, Canada's national public broadcaster, by using a virtual private network like ExpressVPN or NordVPN. This allows users to set their location to Canada and stream the coverage online. The event marks the 96th edition of the quadrennial games, dating back to 1930.

entertainment.title: Shaken, Soaked and Seasick: What It’s Like to Survive ‘The Odyssey’ in 4DX
entertainment.summary: A 3-hour screening of Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" in 4DX format left some viewers shaken and soaked. The immersive experience, featuring seat-rumbling and water-spritzing technology, was available at select theaters. Over 100 people attended the event, with some reporting seasickness and others praising the unique experience. Theaters will continue to offer 4DX screenings of the film.

entertainment.title: Yeon Sang-ho Returns to ‘Parasyte’ Universe With ‘Tamiya,’ Starring Shioli Kutsuna, at Netflix
entertainment.summary: South Korean filmmaker Yeon Sang-ho is returning to the "Parasyte" universe with a new live-action series, "Parasyte: Tamiya," starring Shioli Kutsuna, set to stream on Netflix in 2027. The series marks a collaboration between Netflix and Yeon, who also co-wrote the script with Ryu Yong-jae.

politics.title: Amish Shah Wins Democratic Primary in Swing Arizona House District
politics.summary: Dr. Amish Shah, who beat the choice of the party’s House campaign arm, will face Jay Feely, a Republican, in a battleground district that covers parts of Phoenix.

politics.title: Republican Lawmaker Urges Charges Against Jack Smith
politics.summary: The criminal referral could provide a catalyst for a prosecution of Mr. Smith, who as special counsel became a top target of the president’s retribution campaign.

politics.title: House Passes Defense Bill Amid Iran War Divide
politics.summary: Republicans pushed through the $1.15 trillion bill over opposition from Democrats, who said backing it was akin to embracing the war.

health.title: Hope for thousands of MS patients as 'life-changing' drug now on NHS in England
health.summary: A life-changing drug for thousands of multiple sclerosis patients is now available on the NHS in England, with up to 5,000 people set to benefit each year. The medication, fampridine, boosts nerve signals to help people walk and live independently. Clinical trials showed around four in 10 patients experienced improvements in walking speed and duration. This development could significantly enhance the quality of life for those affected, enabling them to move around their homes and engage with loved ones.

health.title: Target ultra-processed food to reduce obesity in Britain | Letter
health.summary: A British health select committee report finds obesity is an engineered outcome, not a failure of willpower, with evidence pointing to sugar and refined carbohydrates as primary drivers of weight gain and type 2 diabetes. The report criticizes the "high in fat, salt or sugar" framework, which it says is flawed and has led to the low-fat, calorie-controlled orthodoxy. This approach has encouraged manufacturers to replace fat with sweet-tasting substitutes, often in the name of health. The committee is now calling for supermarkets and manufacturers to be held accountable.

sports.title: McInnes glad of Rangers backing in appeal against ban
sports.summary: Rangers manager Derek McInnes has received a four-match touchline ban for criticizing a late penalty awarded to Celtic at Motherwell in May. The comments were made when McInnes was in charge of Hearts, and Rangers are now contesting the ban, citing that the remarks were directed at the decision, not officials. McInnes has expressed his disagreement with the ban and is glad that Rangers will be appealing it. The outcome of the appeal will determine McInnes' availability for upcoming matches.

sports.title: Tears and sleepless nights as Marshall and Adlington get Scotland flag honour
sports.summary: Scottish athletes Marshall and Adlington have been chosen to carry the Scotland flag at the Commonwealth Games. Marshall, a 59-year-old bowler, and Adlington, a 39-year-old judo athlete, will share the honor. The flag will be presented to them on the big show, but they've had to keep the news secret for weeks. The two athletes will now prepare for the Games, where Adlington aims to complete a treble.

sports.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
sports.summary: Liverpool is confident of signing 23-year-old Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola, who impressed with four goal contributions at the World Cup with France this summer. The Reds aim to beat Arsenal and Bayern Munich to the signature. Talks are ongoing, with a potential deal expected to be finalized soon. This move could strengthen Liverpool's attack ahead of the new season.
